business_question: Which product colors are most popular among customers?
business_context: Merchandising teams use color preferences to guide future product assortment planning.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    COLOR,
    SUM(UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_UNITS_SOLD
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY COLOR
ORDER BY TOTAL_UNITS_SOLD DESC;
